stm32_freertos_task_create.tooltip: Create an STM32 FreeRTOS task and task handle; the scheduler is automatically started at the end of setup

stm32_freertos_task_function.tooltip: Define the STM32 FreeRTOS task function with an automatic infinite loop

stm32_freertos_start_scheduler.tooltip: Start the FreeRTOS scheduler at the end of setup; task creation also adds this automatically

stm32_freertos_task_delay_ms.tooltip: Delay the current task in milliseconds using pdMS_TO_TICKS

stm32_freertos_task_delay_ticks.tooltip: Delay the current task by FreeRTOS ticks

stm32_freertos_task_delete.tooltip: Delete a task and clear its handle

stm32_freertos_task_notify_from_isr.tooltip: Safely notify a task from an interrupt

stm32_freertos_task_wait_notification.tooltip: Wait for the current task to receive a notification

stm32_freertos_queue_create.tooltip: Create a FreeRTOS queue for fixed-size data items

stm32_freertos_queue_send.message0: send to queue %1 data %2 type %3 wait %4 %5 ms
stm32_freertos_queue_send.tooltip: Send one item to a queue using a typed temporary variable

stm32_freertos_queue_receive_do.message0: receive from queue %1 type %2 into %3 wait %4 %5 ms
stm32_freertos_queue_receive_do.tooltip: Receive from a queue and run blocks when successful

stm32_freertos_semaphore_create.tooltip: Create a binary semaphore, mutex, or counting semaphore

stm32_freertos_semaphore_give_from_isr.tooltip: Safely give a semaphore from an interrupt

stm32_freertos_attach_interrupt.tooltip: Create an Arduino external interrupt handler for FromISR blocks

stm32_freertos_get_stack_high_water_mark.tooltip: Get a task's remaining stack high water mark

stm32_freertos_get_idle_stack_high_water.message0: idle task stack high water mark
stm32_freertos_get_idle_stack_high_water.tooltip: Get the idle task remaining stack high water mark

stm32_freertos_get_free_heap_size.tooltip: Get current FreeRTOS free heap bytes
